usage: gen_vp [-help] [-allow_finger_outside_cell {0 1}] [-dont_gen_list <string>] [-em_config_file <string>] [-finger_pitch <string>] [-gen_list <string>] [-match_pattern <string>] [-max_cell_extension <string>] [-max_finger_quantity <string>] -output_association_file <string> -output_rule_lef_file <string> [-prefix <string>] [-process_node {N7 N7Plus N6 N5 N4 N3 N2 S5 S3 P1278 P1280}] [-specify_cut_class <string>] [-top_num_limit <string>] [-vp_bottom_layer <string>] [-vp_top_layers <string>] [-write_cut_class {0 1}]

options.name: -allow_finger_outside_cell
options.description: Allow 1 finger outside cell when not able to create multiple fingers inside cell boundary. Default: 0

options.name: -dont_gen_list
options.description: Cell list that dont generate via pillars.

options.name: -em_config_file
options.description: Provide EM config file. EM config file must follow EM syntax/format.

options.name: -finger_pitch
options.description: The pitch of each layer's finger. Default: M2 and M3 are 3 and others are 2.

options.name: -gen_list
options.description: Cell list that generate via pillars.

options.name: -match_pattern
options.description: Customized library cell match pattern to catch footprint and driving strength

options.name: -max_cell_extension
options.description: The maximum extension pitch outside cell boundary for via pillar fingers creation. Specify the value by layer. Default is 1 for all layers

options.name: -max_finger_quantity
options.description: The maximum finger quantity by layer. The value MUST be larger or equal to 2. Default: M2/M4 is 3, M3 is 16, and M5 above is 2.

options.name: -output_association_file
options.description: Generate standard mode via pillar association file.

options.name: -output_rule_lef_file
options.description: Generate standard/rich mode combined via pillar rule LEF.

options.name: -process_node
options.description: {N7 N7Plus N6 N5 N4 N3 N2 S5 S3 P1278 P1280} The library process node. The default finger pitch is corresponding to process node. User still can change the finger pitch by "-finger_pitch".

options.name: -specify_cut_class
options.description: The cut class of each cut layer. For example, specify VIA1's cut class as SINGLECUT_A, apply -specify_cut_class {VIA1 SINGLECUT_A}.

options.name: -top_num_limit
options.description: Write out only the top N largest rules for each cell pin. Default: No limit.

options.name: -vp_bottom_layer
options.description: The bottom layer of created via pillars if pins are available on the specified layer. Default: M1

options.name: -vp_top_layers
options.description: The top layers of created via pillars. Default: {M4 M5}

options.name: -write_cut_class
options.description: Write out cut class in vp file. Default : 0
